attacking_style: Ultra-long distance attacks from km 0, capable of sustaining solo effort over multiple HC climbs. Willing to commit to extreme all-day breakaways on high-mountain stages.

vulnerability: Unknown - no observations of weaknesses available. Strategy appears high-risk given reliance on solo efforts without team support visible.
key_patterns: Exceptional pacing discipline to sustain efforts across 3+ major climbs solo
KOM jersey contender through breakaway accumulation rather than GC climbing battles
